goal: function_eq_on[Domain, Value](domain, left, right) = forall(x0: Domain) { domain.contains(x0) implies left(x0) = right(x0) }

p.c: function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } = function_eq_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, left, right)

not point ∈ domain or right(point) = left(point)

goal: subset.subset(superset) = forall(x0: Domain) { subset.contains(x0) implies superset.contains(x0) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Domain](subset, superset)
